lint.command: uv run black --check mtb/ tests/ scripts/

blockingIssues.description: Timeout handling can return bytes for stdout/stderr from subprocess.TimeoutExpired, violating SandboxResult's str field contract and breaking downstream string operations.
Five listed existing expert problems were duplicated into a separate coding list instead of being converted in place, so expert/all runtime paths still evaluate original pattern-check versions.
library_schema test cases repeat the same empty input/expected output and do not include boundary or edge-case variation required by scope.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a conversion rule for cross-category coding-style problems: when a named existing problem must be converted to code execution, convert the canonical existing definition used by tier/all runtime paths instead of introducing duplicate shadow entries.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature convert-coding-problems-to-execution introduced _CROSS_CATEGORY_EXPERT_CODING duplicates after integration friction, leaving original expert definitions unconverted in runtime paths.

rejectedObservations.observation: Architecture document mismatch observations across multiple reviews
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate and deferred; repeated stale-doc reports were consolidated but not applied in this scrutiny pass to keep focus on blocking code correctness fixes
